title: calomeria macra
intro: Calomeria macra is a plant species that belongs to the Compositae family, commonly known as the aster family. It is a perennial herb native to New Zealand and Australia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Calomeria macra has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which are used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and infections.
